nasb.text: David said to the young man who told him, “Where are you from?” And he answered, “I am the son of an alien, an Amalekite.”

esv.text: And David said to the young man who told him, “Where do you come from?” And he answered, “I am the son of a sojourner, an Amalekite.”

cnv.text: 大衛問那向他報信的年輕人：“你是哪裡的人？”他回答：“我是個寄居這地的亞瑪力人的兒子。”

ccb.text: 大卫又问报信的青年：“你是哪里的人？”他答道：“我是寄居在以色列的亚玛力人。”
